category_sources: Official GitHub README says OpenHMD provides a free and open source API and drivers for immersive technology such as head-mounted displays.
source_facts.description: Free and open source API and drivers for immersive technology
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use OpenHMD.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the project Wiki for support lists and udev rules.
Official GitHub README provides supported devices, platforms, requirements, bindings, compiling, installing, and udev guidance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/OpenHMD/OpenHMD, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes drivers for HMDs with head tracking and lists platforms and device support.
source_facts.description mentions API and drivers for immersive technology.
